content.en:
Misty Pupil Realm.

Ye Tian was cultivating here again, and he was constantly moving in the Mist Pupil Realm, and now he needed more rich Mist Energy, so that he could improve his half-step Perfect Will faster.

this day.

Ye Tian's copying talent finally sensed a creature similar to the Misty Snake.

【Mist Phantom Dragon】

The size of this misty phantom dragon is naturally far inferior to that of the misty snake, and its strength is also very average, which is comparable to an ordinary half-step perfect controller.

Although the other party was in a flash, he was still captured by Ye Tian's copying talent.

Immediately.

Ye Tian used the atomization perfection level ancestral endowment, and cast the instant shadow to track the past.

Under the perception of copying talent, Ye Tian can easily catch the other party's traces and will not be thrown away by the other party.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to follow this misty phantom dragon to a place where the mist energy was incomparably strong, and it was conceivable that the pressure here was absolutely terrifying.

If it weren't for the possession of the atomization perfection level ancestral endowment, he would definitely not be able to bear it.

And the Mist Phantom Dragon also has an atomization perfection level ancestor, and it has a special physique, so it is adapted here, so there will be no problems.

"There are dozens of misty phantom dragons here!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Obviously, this is the lair of the Misty Phantom Dragon.

Just as Ye Tian approached here, an incomparably terrifying misty phantom dragon appeared.

Fortunately, the other party is not a perfect controller, but a misty phantom dragon that is comparable to the combat power of a peak half-step perfect controller.

In an instant, the other party directly attacked Ye Tian.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian is indeed a little worse.

However, with the exemption of the Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment and the Immortal Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment, Ye Tian was not afraid of the attack power of the peak half-step perfect-level master.

Thundered!!!!

The fight has begun!

Although Ye Tian fell into the disadvantage, he quickly broke away from the battle and got rid of this misty phantom dragon.

......

"It seems that there are quite a few creatures similar to the Misty Serpent in the Misty Pupil Realm, but they all live in areas where the fog is very thick. In other words, the area where the Snake of the Mist sends us in is the outer area, and these creatures live in the inner area, so they are usually not touched by a half-step perfect master. Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the following days, Ye Tian practiced in this area, occasionally exploring around.

The inner perimeter of the misty pupil boundary is different from the periphery, and the periphery is almost nothing, a void.

However, there are some treasures in the inner enclosure, but these treasures are occupied by misty races like the Misty Phantom Dragon.

Moving here, Ye Tian is also very careful, after all, once he encounters the Misty Race at the level of a perfect controller, if he attacks him, his will clone will be completely finished, and it will even affect the copy body.

So, he had to be careful and careful.

However, Ye Tian has the Atomization Perfection Grade Ancestral Endowment, and the Misty Pupil Realm does not have a great impact on him, even if he really falls, the copy body will not die.

Otherwise, he wouldn't dare to explore here rashly.

this day.

Ye Tian discovered an incomparably huge island in the Misty Pupil Realm, and there were also several misty creatures here that were comparable to the level of a half-step perfect master.

However, the most powerful misty creature is only a half-step perfect controller comparable to the top.

Therefore, there is no threat to Ye Tian here.

Soon.

Ye Tian fought with the misty creatures here, and quickly killed one mist creature after another, but the misty creature that was comparable to the top half-step perfect controller fled, and Ye Tian did not chase and kill.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian collected all the resources of this island, and then left quickly.

Not only that, Ye Tian also found a few beads from the dead misty creatures.

"Mist Orb!"

Ye Tian quickly knew the value of the Mist Golden Bead, which could refine the will and the body of control.

In other words, this mist gold bead is not only mild in energy, but can even be taken out and used, which can greatly temper the will and control the body, and is very valuable.

"It seems that every misty creature has this misty orb in its body. It's an incredible place to be, and those who are in perfect control should know about it, right?"

Ye Tian guessed.

However, even if the Perfect Controllers knew, they would not have been able to tell him.

Moreover, here in the Misty Pupil Realm, there may be a terrifying creature comparable to the Misty Serpent, but he has not encountered it so far.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian began to refine the Mist Golden Bead and other resources he found.

The resources here are all resources that contain the special energy of the mist, and they can be easily refined, but after they are taken out, whether they will become ordinary resources or not, Ye Tian is not clear.

In short, he directly refined these resources here in the Misty Pupil Realm.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian's half-step Perfection Realm will quickly improved under the action of the Misty Golden Bead.

Before you know it, another 10,000 eternal years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had been practicing in the Mist Pupil Realm for a long time, and finally on this day, he used the resources of the Mist Pupil Realm to raise his half-step perfect will to the consummation realm.

Rumble!!!!

Half-step perfection of will, half-step perfection of control of the body.

Coupled with the fact that Ye Tian had created a large number of top-notch perfect control techniques, he was already a peak half-step perfect master at this time.

"Unexpectedly, since coming to the Bloody War Capital for tens of thousands of eternity, Xiu Wei has crossed from an ordinary half-step perfect controller to a top half-step perfect controller, to a peak half-step perfect controller, my current strength is not weak among the peak half-step perfect controllers, and it can even be regarded as very powerful, very close to the half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he also knew very well that it was too difficult to step into the Half-Step Perfect Controller of the Creation Extreme Realm, and it was even more difficult than stepping into the Half-Step Perfect Master.

However, he had refined a lot of Extreme Gold Liquid in the Extreme Creation Gold River, and he already had the qualifications to impact the Extreme Creation Realm as a half-step perfect controller.

"Next, it will be difficult for the will and the body of control to progress, and you have to go to the change of the enlightenment path!"

Over the years, Ye Tian had also been contemplating the changes of the Dao of Enlightenment, and the changes of nearly two thousand Dao had reached the level of three or three billion, forming a perfect imprint.

It can be said that even the number of perfect marks of some half-step perfect masters of the Extreme Realm is far inferior to him.

"It's time to comprehend the changes in the Endless Way!"

Ye Tian decided.

After all, once the changes of the Endless Dao have mastered the three or three billion changes, he can form the Endless Dao Perfect Mark, and the path he created himself will become the Perfect Dao, and he will be qualified to impact the Perfect Master.

Although he won't attack the Perfect Controller now, he can rest assured if he has the qualifications!

"Then practice diligently and strive to condense the perfect imprint of the Endless Path as soon as possible. "

Ye Tian muttered.
